Instill  

Description

2: Root

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 60 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 2.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Fizzle Adj: 25
Deletable: Yes Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your feet adhere to the ground.
Cast on other: Soandso adheres to the ground.
Effect Fades: Your feet come free.

Game Description

Causes the earth to adhere to your target's feet, preventing them from moving for up to 1.1 mins @L17 to 1.6 mins @L27.

Items with this effect

  • Earring of Living Slime
  • Spell: Instill [storebought]
  • Spell: Instill [Enchanter]
  • Spell: Instill [Wizard]

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Instill
Spell: Instill
Spell: Instill
ClassLevel
PAL54
ENC25
WIZ17
SHM33
NEC53
CLR27
Expansion:

Duration:
1.1 mins @L17 to 1.6 mins @L27

10 posts

# Feb 18 2006 at 12:25 PM Rating: Decent

View User Forum
6 posts
Cavalier Waut has this spell for 3.363pp as of 2/18/2006
▲ Page top
To Buy
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2005 at 12:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591863751171
877 posts
Just bought in PoKnowledge library, floor second from the very top, on a short Gnomish Palidan spell vender, "Cavalier Waut". Cost a Eru Chanter, Cha@ 86, 3.393 plat.

At and beyond level 27, this spell is, effectively, twice the duration for twice the mana, when compared to Root.
▲ Page top
instill
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2005 at 10:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245676920
4 posts
sold in halas at telvina, why buy if you have root?
▲ Page top
RE: instill
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2005 at 2:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801176674
View User Forum
Scholar
67 posts
compare durations. 8 ticks for Root ... (8*6=48).

12 - 48 seconds vs 66 - 96 seconds

*edited for math. hehe.

Edited, Mon Nov 7 14:42:03 2005
▲ Page top
RE: instill
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2009 at 2:16 PM Rating: Decent
nabiki
91 posts
True but root casts faster at 2 secs vs Instill's 2.5 secs. Root is 30 mana, Instill is 60. Also as with any spell in the root line it can break at anytime in it's duration including a tick after you cast it, especially if you're doing damage to the mob. So unless your planning to park the mob and leave it alone root is probably the better choice.
____________________________
www.thekirealms.com - home of the eq/ranma crossover fusion- Chaos Quest

I'm missing something
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2004 at 4:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261250934
Scholar
98 posts
Why use Instill when Paralyzing Earth lasts for 3 mins? Is it just resisted less?
▲ Page top
RE: I'm missing something
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2005 at 2:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591830074301
1 post
jepp, you are missing something

Instill:
Necromancer level 53
Enchanter level 29
Wizard level 20
Paladin level 54
Shaman level 34
Cleric level 29

Paralyzing Earth:
Enchanter level 49
Wizard level 49
Necromancer level 49
Cleric level 56
Shaman level 56

i assume you are a necro. as you see, every other class then necro has instill before paralyzing earth (except palas). why it's the other way round with necs i don't know. probably one of those strange whims of the EQ makers.
▲ Page top
RE: I'm missing something
QuoteReply
# Feb 23 2004 at 8:39 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361927303
161 posts
because I don't get that spell thats why. my last spell befor this one was root. the life of a pally!
